toast.$description: Toast notification colors — ephemeral overlays favoring attention-grabbing brightness over brand cohesion. Distinct from static --success/--warning/--destructive semantic vars (used for in-flow UI like form errors). Toasts are transient and want pop, not subtlety. ADR 0024 phase 6: moved from mp/globals.css to centralize.

successBg.$description: Toast success background — vibrant emerald oklch. Brighter than nd's semantic success (which is muted sage for in-flow UI).

errorBg.$description: Toast error background — vibrant red oklch. Brighter than nd's semantic destructive (which is terracotta).

warningBg.$description: Toast warning background — vibrant amber oklch. Brighter than nd's semantic warning (muted).

defaultLightness.$description: Default toast lightness — pulls from runtime circadian engine in mp. Static fallback: 0.72.

defaultChroma.$description: Default toast chroma — subtle but visible against any bg.

defaultHueRef.$description: Default toast hue — follows circadian-driven --dynamic-hue. Composed in mp/globals.css; primitive lives here.
